notes: Reddit r/PokemonTCG community study, n=1405 packs, rates as relayed by ThePriceDex: holo rare 1/5.6 (17.86%), V 1/12.4 (8.06%), VMAX 1/24.8 (4.03%), ultra rare 1/27.4 (3.65%), rainbow rare 1/93.6 (1.07%), secret rare 1/117 (0.85%). All hits modeled in the rare slot with residual mass on non-holo rare; reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. Confidence medium: sample >1000 packs but figures read via a secondary aggregator. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. ETB SWSH era = 8 packs.
